my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: Implementation complete: added 'sort_palette' param (None default) to quantize(), applied via new module-level helper _sort_palette_colors() (uses existing remap_palette()) in both the normal quantization path and the palette= reference-image path. Supports 'brightness' and 'rgb' sort modes, raises ValueError otherwise. Added test_quantize_sort_palette (parametrized), test_quantize_sort_palette_with_reference_palette, and test_quantize_sort_palette_invalid to Tests/test_image_quantize.py, appended after test_transparent_colors_equal. All existing + new tests in the file pass (11 passed, 1 skipped for missing libimagequant). Note: I don't see your error_threshold changes in my copy of the file, so we may be operating on separate sandboxes without shared disk state — worth flagging in case the final merge is done elsewhere.
